name: cm-capture-claim
description: Captures insurance claim details and creates a random claim reference number for Westfund claim intake. When details are missing, generic claim values are auto-filled.

claimantId.description: Preferred claimant id from cm-idv-claimant; memberId and policy are then inherited from that claimant.

serviceType.description: Optional service type (defaults to Generic Service).

providerName.description: Optional provider name (defaults to Generic Provider).

dateOfService.description: dd/mm/yyyy, yyyy-mm-dd, or natural text like '11th of April 2026'.

descriptionOfTreatment.description: Optional treatment description; generic text is used when omitted.

claimAmount.description: Optional claim amount; random demo amount is generated when omitted.

itemNumbers.description: Extras item numbers; also accepts comma-separated string. Defaults to ['000'] for Extras if omitted.

claims.description: Optional multi-claim submission. Each item can include claimType, serviceType, providerName, providerId, dateOfService, descriptionOfTreatment, claimAmount, itemNumbers.

fullName.description: Optional fallback to identify claimant when claimantId is absent.

memberId.description: Fallback member id. Required when claimantId is not provided.

policy.description: Optional policy name; carried from IDV when available.
